title: Unthreading the World-Edge
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A blind weaver's apprentice who can feel the threads of fate discovers she accidentally severed a strand connecting a hero to their destiny, and must journey across the fractured kingdom to the World-Edge to mend it before the hero's death unravels history.
long_description: A blind weaver's apprentice who can feel the threads of fate discovers she accidentally severed a strand connecting a hero to their destiny, and must journey across the fractured kingdom to the World-Edge to mend it before the hero's death unravels history.
